title: Classification Loss Path
description: Build fluency in Classification Loss inside Loss Functions by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Focal Loss (α-γ)
steps.summary: A loss function used in object detection tasks to focus on hard examples. It sits inside Loss Functions / Classification Loss. Start after Loss and Loss Function. It opens into Focal Cosine Loss and Focal-Tversky Loss.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Categorical Cross Entropy
steps.summary: A loss function used for classification tasks with categorical outputs. It sits inside Loss Functions / Classification Loss. Start after Cross-Entropy and Cross-Entropy Method. It opens into Categorical Cross-Entropy Loss Function and Categorical-Cross-Entropy (Softmax).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Cross Entropy Loss
steps.summary: Cross Entropy Loss belongs to the Loss Functions area of AI/ML, within Classification Loss. It sits inside Loss Functions / Classification Loss. Start after Cross-Entropy and Cross-Entropy Method. It opens into Binary Cross-Entropy Loss and Cross-Entropy Loss Variants.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Huber Loss
steps.summary: Huber Loss belongs to the Loss Functions area of AI/ML, within Classification Loss. It sits inside Loss Functions / Classification Loss. Start after Loss and Huber. It opens into Quantile Huber Loss and Huber Loss Trees.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Focal Loss Variants
steps.summary: Focal Loss Variants belongs to the Loss Functions area of AI/ML, within Classification Loss. It sits inside Loss Functions / Classification Loss. Start after Focal Loss (α-γ) and Loss. It opens into Focal Loss Variants and Extensions and Focal Loss Variants and Extensions Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Focal Loss Extensions
steps.summary: Focal Loss Extensions belongs to the Loss Functions area of AI/ML, within Classification Loss. It sits inside Loss Functions / Classification Loss. Start after Focal Loss (α-γ) and Loss. It opens into Focal Loss Extensions Techniques and Focal Loss Extensions Enhancements.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Dynamic Loss Balancing
steps.summary: Dynamic Loss Balancing belongs to the Loss Functions area of AI/ML, within Classification Loss. It sits inside Loss Functions / Classification Loss. Start after Loss and Loss Function. It opens into Dynamic Loss Balancing (DWA) and Dynamic Loss Balancing (Homoscedastic).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Binary Cross Entropy
steps.summary: Binary Cross Entropy belongs to the Loss Functions area of AI/ML, within Classification Loss. It sits inside Loss Functions / Classification Loss. Start after Cross-Entropy and Cross-Entropy Method. It opens into Binary Cross-Entropy Loss and Binary-Cross-Entropy (BCE).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
